imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Modern real-estate building exterior hero photo with clean architectural lines, daylight, wide composition (home-hero-building.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Update the Home page hero background image to use a new building-themed image (instead of the current "/assets/Screenshot 2026-02-16 030700.png").
Add the newly generated building image to the frontend as a static asset under "frontend/public/assets/generated" and reference it from the Home page hero.
Remove the text label "Our Properties" from the About page featured image section while keeping the rest of the section styling/layout intact (icon, image, card container, spacing, and animations).

new_feature_requests.summary: Update Home page hero image to a building picture
Remove the name/text 'our properties' from the About page

projectName: Update Home hero image to building and remove 'Our Properties' label on About page
